name: hyperframes-media
description: Asset preprocessing for HyperFrames compositions — text-to-speech narration (Kokoro), audio/video transcription (Whisper), captions, voiceover assets, avatar-overlay background removal, and standalone HyperFrames media prep.

defaultWorkflow: Use Creative audio tools first when working inside a Prometheus Creative project.
Use HyperFrames CLI media commands for standalone/offline HyperFrames asset preprocessing.
For avatar workflows, generate/source avatar video externally, then use HyperFrames/Creative to compose muted video plus separate audio/captions.
